measurementBasis: Measured directly from the current repository worktree with forge test --root bridge --gas-report and completed local CLI e2e transaction receipts.
notes: Gas values are protocol transaction gasUsed values, not a guarantee for every future calldata shape or verifier implementation.
ERC-20 approval transactions are listed as separate approve components when the CLI command sends an approval transaction.

wallet transfer-notes and wallet redeem-notes use the same proof-backed executeChannelTransaction baseline measured from the successful wallet mint-notes CLI e2e receipt because the current e2e run stopped before producing fresh transfer/redeem receipts.

commands.description: Create a bridge channel and initialize its policy snapshot.

transactions.label: createChannel
transactions.sourceDetail: BridgeCore.createChannel max successful path from forge test --root bridge --gas-report.

commands.description: Deposit canonical tokens into the shared bridge vault.

transactions.label: approve
transactions.sourceDetail: Measured on local anvil by deploying bridge/src/mocks/MockERC20.sol and sending approve(address,uint256).

commands.description: Withdraw canonical tokens from the shared bridge vault.
Pay the channel join fee and register a wallet identity.

transactions.label: approve
transactions.sourceDetail: Measured on local anvil by deploying bridge/src/mocks/MockERC20.sol and sending approve(address,uint256). channel join sends this approval only when the channel join fee is nonzero.

transactions.label: joinChannel
transactions.sourceDetail: L1TokenVault.joinChannel max successful path from forge test --root bridge --gas-report.

commands.description: Move bridged funds into the channel accounting vault.

transactions.label: depositToChannelVault
transactions.sourceDetail: Three completed local CLI e2e wallet deposit-channel receipts from the current worktree.

commands.description: Move channel accounting vault funds back into the shared bridge vault.

transactions.label: withdrawFromChannelVault
transactions.sourceDetail: L1TokenVault.withdrawFromChannelVault max successful path from forge test --root bridge --gas-report.

commands.description: Exit a channel after the channel balance is zero.

transactions.label: exitChannel
transactions.sourceDetail: L1TokenVault.exitChannel max successful path from forge test --root bridge --gas-report.

commands.description: Submit a proof-backed private-state mint transaction.

transactions.label: executeChannelTransaction
transactions.sourceDetail: Completed local CLI e2e wallet mint-notes bridge-submit-receipt.json from the current worktree.

commands.description: Submit a proof-backed private-state transfer transaction.

transactions.label: executeChannelTransaction
transactions.sourceDetail: Uses the current successful wallet mint-notes executeChannelTransaction receipt as the shared proof-backed DApp command baseline.

commands.description: Submit a proof-backed private-state redeem transaction.

transactions.label: executeChannelTransaction
transactions.sourceDetail: Uses the current successful wallet mint-notes executeChannelTransaction receipt as the shared proof-backed DApp command baseline.
